name: Cornhole Duels
short_description: A 1990s arcade take on the game of Cornhole. Hit the hole with your bag in the wooden board far from you to score a point. Practice on your own, invite a friend over and play your duel using the same keyboard or launch yourself into fascinating challenges against the computer.
detailed_description:
A 1990s arcade take on the Cornhole game.

Hit the hole with your bag in the wooden board far from you to score a point. With each point you take life away from your opponent.

TRAINING MODE

Train yourself by trying to score as many consecutive points as possible.

You can choose to train as Player 1 or as Player 2.

If you can achieve certain scores, you will get achievements. You will also get an additional life point at these scores, which will allow you to make an extra error.

Will you be able to reach, for example, 500 consecutive points?

Only the best will succeed, and the score will be shown in the leaderboard.

"VERSUS CPU" MODE

Throw yourself into fascinating challenges against the computer, with three different modes to choose from:

  • EASY

  • MEDIUM

  • HARD

Can you win every duel?

"VERSUS MODE" - PLAYER VS PLAYER

If, on the other hand, you are a believer in the old days, invite a friend over and play your duel using the same keyboard!
